title: Scout
description: Extending the inventory "physically" (adding slots) through various bags.
body:
**Scout** is a mod focused on "physically" extending the inventory (adding slots) through wearing various types of bags. It is heavily inspired by makamys' [Satchels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/satchels).

![Preview image of inventory with a pouch, an upgraded pouch, and upgraded satchel equipped](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Cynosphere-mc/Scout/main/.assets/inventory_preview.png)

Bags are equipped through [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) slots. Pouches have their own slot added on the legs area.

Items are retained on the bag item itself. There is a preview in the tooltip of the item to see what is inside.

## Mod Interactions
* [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - Exclusion zones, default recipes for recipe tree
* [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/roughly-enough-items) - Exclusion zones (before 2.0.0)

## Forge?
Scout has been tested working with [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) on a basic level. At the time of writing, there is no compatibility yet in [Connector Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras) to translate Trinkets into Curios.
